languages.text: By helping to optimize the Standard Template Constructs, Eogan sped up production and reinforced defensive perimeters, while also cutting many unnecessary jobs

traits.locale_text: By helping to optimize the Standard Template Constructs, Eogan sped up production and reinforced defensive perimeters, while also cutting many unnecessary jobs

languages.text: Адептус Механикус весьма благосклонно отнеслись к участию генетора экстремис Эоганна Фебруса в церемонии Магнэ Ацессио, что привело к росту эффективности всех производств в протекторате фон Валанциус. Возникшая нехватка рабочих рук была устранена путем ввода в эксплуатацию огромного количества новых сервиторов.

The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magnae Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.
languages.original_text: Адептус Механикус весьма благосклонно отнеслись к участию генетора экстремис Эоганна Фебруса в церемонии Магнэ Ацессио, что привело к росту эффективности всех производств в протекторате фон Валанциус. Возникшая нехватка рабочих рук была устранена путем ввода в эксплуатацию огромного количества новых сервиторов.

traits.locale_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magnae Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magnae Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magnae Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

languages.text: El Adeptus Mechanicus vio de forma muy favorable la participación del Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs en la ceremonia de la Magnae Accesio, lo que llevó a un aumento drástico de eficacia en todas las industrias del protectorado von Valancius. El resultante aumento del desempleo se solucionó encargando la creación de un gran número de servidores nuevos.
languages.original_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magne Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

traits.locale_text: El Adeptus Mechanicus vio de forma muy favorable la participación del Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs en la ceremonia de la Magnae Accesio, lo que llevó a un aumento drástico de eficacia en todas las industrias del protectorado von Valancius. El resultante aumento del desempleo se solucionó encargando la creación de un gran número de servidores nuevos.

languages.text: 机械修会对特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯参加继任颂典一事给予了高度认可，这使得冯·瓦兰修斯属地内所有产业的生产效率都得到了提升。由此产生的劳动力短缺问题，则通过投入大批全新的机仆得以解决。
languages.original_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magne Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

traits.locale_text: 机械修会对特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯参加继任颂典一事给予了高度认可，这使得冯·瓦兰修斯属地内所有产业的生产效率都得到了提升。由此产生的劳动力短缺问题，则通过投入大批全新的机仆得以解决。

languages.text: L'Adeptus Mechanicus a vu d'un bon œil la participation du genetor extremis Eogunn Februs à la cérémonie de Magne Accessio. Désormais, toutes les industries du protectorat von Valancius fonctionnent avec une efficacité accrue. Le manque de main-d'œuvre qui en résulte a été compensé par une commande massive de nouveaux servitors.
languages.original_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magne Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

traits.locale_text: L'Adeptus Mechanicus a vu d'un bon œil la participation du genetor extremis Eogunn Februs à la cérémonie de Magne Accessio. Désormais, toutes les industries du protectorat von Valancius fonctionnent avec une efficacité accrue. Le manque de main-d'œuvre qui en résulte a été compensé par une commande massive de nouveaux servitors.

languages.text: Adeptus Mechanicus, Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs'un Magnae Accessio törenine katılımını olumlu karşıladı. Bu durum, von Valancius protektorasındaki tüm endüstrilerin verimliliğinde artışa yol açtı. Ortaya çıkan iş gücü açığı, devasa sayıda yeni hizmetörün göreve başlatılmasıyla giderildi.
languages.original_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magne Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

traits.locale_text: Adeptus Mechanicus, Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs'un Magnae Accessio törenine katılımını olumlu karşıladı. Bu durum, von Valancius protektorasındaki tüm endüstrilerin verimliliğinde artışa yol açtı. Ortaya çıkan iş gücü açığı, devasa sayıda yeni hizmetörün göreve başlatılmasıyla giderildi.

languages.text: 機械神殿は、遺伝子操作された極限の生殖者であるエオグン・フェブルスがマグネ・アクセシオの儀式に参加したことを高く評価し、フォン・バルアンシウス保護領のすべての産業の効率が向上した。その結果生じた労働力不足は、大量の新しいサービトールを導入することで解消された。
languages.original_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magne Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.

traits.locale_text: 機械神殿は、遺伝子操作された極限の生殖者であるエオグン・フェブルスがマグネ・アクセシオの儀式に参加したことを高く評価し、フォン・バルアンシウス保護領のすべての産業の効率が向上した。その結果生じた労働力不足は、大量の新しいサービトールを導入することで解消された。

languages.text: Das Adeptus Mechanicus blickte wohlwollend auf die Teilnahme von Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs an der Magnae-Accessio-Zeremonie, die zu einer Erhöhung der Effizienz aller Industrien innerhalb des Protektorats derer von Valancius führte. Dem daraus resultierende Arbeitsmangel wurde durch die Zuteilung zahlloser neuer Servitoren begegnet.
languages.original_text: The Adeptus Mechanicus looked favourably on the participation of Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs in the Magne Accessio ceremony, which led to an increase in the efficiency of all industries in the von Valancius protectorate. The resulting labour shortage was addressed by the commissioning of a huge number of new servitors.
